name: Folded Terracotta
description: A folded rust-orange textile swatch rests against speckled grey carpet samples, warm wool catching low light over a cool granular field.

name: Workshop Beacon
description: A glass-domed red signal lamp mounted on rust-mottled cast machinery, surrounded by the painted greens and ochres of an old workshop.

name: Veined Marble
description: A polished marble slab where rust and grey strata swirl through cream veining, all caught under a soft sheen.

name: Bar Paniek Signage
description: A cluster of hand-lettered enamel and neon signs—orange, red, and cobalt—stacked against the steel rafters of an industrial market hall threaded with palms.
